Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (gift in virtual currency)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (gift in virtual currency)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to provide that a taxpayerâs taxable capital gain for a taxation year from the disposition of a property is equal to zero if the disposition is the making of a gift in an eligible virtual currency to a qualified donee.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Subparagraph 38(a.1)(i) of the Income Tax Act is replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: the disposition is the making of a gift to a qualified donee of a share, debt obligation or right listed on a designated stock exchange, a share of the capÂ­ital stock of a mutual fund corporation, a unit of a mutual fund trust, an interest in a related segregaÂ­ted fund trust (within the meaning assigned by paragraph 138.1(1)(a)), a prescribed debt obligation or an amount denominated in an eligible virtual currency,

Section.Text: Subsection 221(1) of the Act is amended by striking out âandâ at the end of paragraph (i) and by adding the following after that paragraph:

Paragraph.Label: (i.1)
Paragraph.Text: establishing a schedule that sets out a list of ineligible virtual currencies for the purpose of subparagraph 38(a.1)(i); and
